title: Carved Pumpkin Face
description: Makes Carved Pumkin & Jack O Lantern same as Snow Golem
body:
Makes the Carved Pumpkin and Jack O Lantern have the same Face as Snow Golem.

Shaders used for Image -> [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined).

And when You wear Carved Pumpkin, the Blur will change too.
